WiredBoatImage.title: Wired Boat Image
WiredBoatImage.description: Manually wired direct image URLs for a specific boat name.

boatName.description: The exact boat name matching the app state.

urls.description: List of direct image link URLs

updatedBy.description: The user ID who updated these links

Whitelist.title: Operator Whitelist
Whitelist.description: Whitelist of Gmail addresses authorized to use the app.

wiredBoatImages/{boatId}.description: Maps a boat (using a safe boat name ID) to its custom wired images list.

config/{documentId}.description: System configurations such as the operator email whitelist.
